Do you agree or disagree with the original conclusion that "open access endoscopy closes the door to an adequately informed patient"?

The retrieved evidence underscores consistent emphasis on interprofessional teamwork, clear communication, and standardized informed consent processes across various endoscopic procedures—including those involving open access models.
